# Rikugan Persistent Memory

This file persists across sessions. The agent reads the first 200 lines into its system prompt.

- [prior_analysis] Function _process_buffer_cff (0x100000510-0x1000006e8, 472 bytes) was CFF-obfuscated with a -O0 memory-store pattern. State variable at [rbp-0x10], dispatcher loop at 0x10000053b, convergence block at 0x1000006de. State machine: 0x10→0x25→0x37→0x4a→0x5c→0x6e→return. Dead states: 0xde (error trap via opaque predicates), default (unexpected state). Two opaque predicates: `if(false)` at 0x1000005c2 and `if(true)` at 0x100000672. Deobfuscated by NOPing 63 machine-code instructions: 12 state variable stores, dispatcher back edge, comparison cascade, and dead code blocks. Recovered linear logic: (1) XOR first byte with checksum if len>0, (2) sum all bytes into checksum, (3) rotate left 3 and XOR with length, (4) fold checksum (low16 ^ high16), (5) printf result. Calls: 0x1000004c0, 0x1000004d0 (in real path), 0x1000004e0 (dead_code_trap, never reached).
- [architecture] Binary cff_test is a small Mach-O x86_64 test binary (9 functions) containing CFF-obfuscated functions. The CFF uses -O0 memory-store pattern: state variable stored at stack slot [rbp-0x10] via MOV instructions, not SSA variables. IL-level NOPs (il_nop_expr, il_remove_block) do NOT propagate to the decompiler for this pattern — byte-level patching via nop_instructions is required for effective deobfuscation.
- [prior_analysis] Function _simple_cff (0x1000006f0-0x10000076e, 126 bytes) was CFF-obfuscated with -O0 memory-store pattern. State variable at [rbp-0x8], dispatcher at 0x100000708, convergence back edge at 0x100000768. State machine: 1→2→3→0→return. Default state exits to 0. Deobfuscated by NOPing 24 machine-code instructions: 5 state variable stores, 13 dispatcher cascade instructions, 3 dispatcher loop instructions, 3 convergence jumps. Recovered linear logic: (arg1 * 3 + 7) ^ 0xAA. No opaque predicates or MBA expressions present. Decompiler output after patching: `return zx.q(arg1 * 3 + 7) ^ 0xaa` — single clean line.
- [prior_analysis] Full binary deobfuscation sweep complete for cff_test. Two CFF-obfuscated functions found and deobfuscated: _process_buffer_cff (0x100000510, 63 instructions NOPed) and _simple_cff (0x1000006f0, 24 instructions NOPed). No string encryption, no MBA, no VM virtualization detected. Opaque predicates (_always_true, _always_false) were only used in _process_buffer_cff and handled in prior session. Remaining functions: _main (clean, calls both CFF functions), _dead_code_trap (error handler, never reached in real path), _always_true/_always_false (trivial single-block helpers), 3 libc stubs.
